JavaScript tests for the `instanceof` operator with numbers, strings, and objects.


## Files
- **[11.08.06-001.js](11.08.06-001.js.md)**: Tests the `instanceof` operator with a primitive number and the `Number` object.
- **[11.08.06-002.js](11.08.06-002.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `instanceof` operator with a `Number` object.
- **[11.08.06-003.js](11.08.06-003.js.md)**: Tests if a variable is an instance of the Number object using the instanceof operator.
- **[11.08.06-004.js](11.08.06-004.js.md)**: Tests the `instanceof` operator with a string literal in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.06-005.js](11.08.06-005.js.md)**: Tests if a String object is an instance of the String constructor using `instanceof`.
- **[11.08.06-006.js](11.08.06-006.js.md)**: Tests the `instanceof` operator to verify object `b` is an instance of function `a`.
- **[11.08.06-007.js](11.08.06-007.js.md)**: Tests if a variable is an instance of the Object class using the `instanceof` operator.
